legacy.content:
# Phase 30-03 Summary: Journal, Combat Gate, Focus
## Done
1. **Feed → Journal** — Replaced Map/Feed/Context tabs with Map/Journal. Journal tab shows room stats (fog, look) + event feed. 2. **Combat only during encounter** — [C] and Combat Screen button only when fight is available (hostile nearby). Moving into room with enemy auto-switches to Combat; movement blocked until flee/fight. 3. **Contextual keyboard hints** — [C] Combat only appears in hint bar when hasEncounter. 4. **Docs-site iframe** — Added Focus game button, Fullscreen toggle, tabIndex and onClick to focus iframe for keyboard capture.
## Files Changed
- `packages/kaplay-demo/src/grid.ts` — hasEncounter, executeMove auto-combat, Feed→Journal, contextual hints - `packages/kaplay-demo/src/intent-router.ts` — hasEncounter in hotkey map - `docs-site/components/game/play-game-shell.tsx` — Focus, Fullscreen buttons
## Left for future
- Full 3-column layout (left nav, center, right journal) — current Journal is a tab in center - Left panel for Inventory etc. — action menu [E] still the main entry; contextual actions in room - Encounters with any entity — engine currently gates fight to hostile only
